gave.example_en: She gave me a beautiful gift for my birthday.

break.example_en: Don't break the window! Let's take a break instead.

person.example_en: She's the kindest person I've ever met.

damn.example_en: Damn, I forgot my wallet at home!

white.example_en: She painted the walls white to make the room brighter.

mark.example_ko: 사진이 걸려 있던 벽에 자국이 있어요.

jump.example_en: The kids love to jump on the trampoline.

sense.example_en: That doesn't make any sense to me.

past.example_en: You can't change the past, but you can learn from it.

brother.example_en: My brother is two years older than me.

die.example_en: The plant will die if you don't water it.

stupid.example_en: That was a stupid mistake, but we all learn from them.

afraid.example_en: Don't be afraid to make mistakes when learning.
